fundamentals.name: Reddit, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Reddit, Inc. operates a digital community in the United States and internationally. The company's platform enables user to engage in conversations, explore passions, research new hobbies, exchange goods and services, create new communities and experiences, share laughs, and find belonging. It also organizes communities based on specific interests that enable users to engage in conversations by sharing experiences, submitting links, uploading images and videos, and replying to one another. Reddit, Inc. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing, highly profitable company with a strong balance sheet trading at a reasonable forward multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 79.1%; next earnings date is 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 69.1% YoY and quarterly earnings growth 679.8% indicate strong top and bottom-line expansion.
Profit margin 28.6% and Return on Equity 26.2% demonstrate excellent operational efficiency and profitability.
Forward P/E of 16.32x is attractive given the high growth rates and a PEG ratio of 1.01.
Exceptional liquidity with a Current Ratio of 12.73 and minimal debt relative to cash ($2.77B cash vs $21.29M debt).
negatives: Trailing P/E of 41.19x and Price/Sales of 11.22x suggest the stock may still be richly valued on historical metrics.
Beta of 1.85 indicates higher volatility compared to the broader market.
Analyst price targets show a wide range ($120.00 to $300.00), implying uncertainty about future performance.

news.paragraph: Reddit's valuation is under scrutiny following a recent pullback in its share price, with conflicting signals emerging regarding its fair value. While the company has demonstrated significant revenue and earnings growth, including a substantial beat on its last reported EPS, the market appears to be weighing these positives against potential overvaluation. The next earnings report on July 30th will be key to determining if the current growth trajectory justifies the current stock price.

headlines.title: Reddit (RDDT) Valuation Check After Share Price Pullback And Conflicting Fair Value Signals
